tasks.name: implement-force-stop-foundation
tasks.task:
Read plans/pipeline-force-stop.md for the full design, gotchas, and reuse notes before writing any code.

Implement the foundation layer changes for the pipeline-force-stop feature:

1. Create src/errors/pipelineAbortedError.ts
   - Follow the exact pattern in src/errors/pipelineMaxRetriesError.ts (see R1 in the plan)
   - No constructor params
   - Message: 'Pipeline aborted by user'
   - Must set this.name = 'PipelineAbortedError'

2. Modify src/types/pipeline.ts
   - Add `signal?: AbortSignal` to the PipelineRunOptions type

3. Modify src/types/agent.ts
   - Add `signal?: AbortSignal` to the ExecuteOptions type

Run ts_checker after all changes to verify lint + build + tests pass.

tasks.name: review-force-stop-foundation
tasks.task:
target_path: src/errors
ng_output_path: .claude/tmp/review-force-stop-foundation

Also review src/types/pipeline.ts and src/types/agent.ts.

Check the pipeline-force-stop foundation layer changes:
1. src/errors/pipelineAbortedError.ts: new class, extends Error, sets this.name, message is 'Pipeline aborted by user', no constructor params
2. src/types/pipeline.ts: PipelineRunOptions has signal?: AbortSignal added
3. src/types/agent.ts: ExecuteOptions has signal?: AbortSignal added
4. No layer violations: types/ files may not import from any src/ layer

tasks.command: npm run lint:fix && npm run build && npm run test:unit

tasks.name: commit-force-stop-foundation
tasks.task:
Foundation layer changes are complete and passing. Commit the following files with an appropriate conventional commit message:
- src/errors/pipelineAbortedError.ts (new)
- src/types/pipeline.ts (signal added to PipelineRunOptions)
- src/types/agent.ts (signal added to ExecuteOptions)

Suggested message: feat(errors,types): add PipelineAbortedError and signal to run options
